mapper.select: SELECT diet_id AS dietId, user_id AS userId, DATE_FORMAT(log_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS logDate, meal_time AS mealTime, memo, total_calorie AS totalCalorie, total_carb AS totalCarb, total_protein AS totalProtein, total_fat AS totalFat, photo_path AS photoPath FROM diet_log WHERE diet_id = #{dietId}
SELECT item_id AS itemId, diet_id AS dietId, food_id AS foodId, food_name AS foodName, gram, calorie, carb, protein, fat FROM diet_item WHERE diet_id = #{dietId} ORDER BY item_id
SELECT item_id AS itemId, diet_id AS dietId, calorie, carb, protein, fat FROM diet_item WHERE item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT d.diet_id, d.user_id, DATE_FORMAT(d.log_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS log_date, d.meal_time, d.memo, d.photo_path, d.total_calorie, d.total_carb, d.total_protein, d.total_fat, i.item_id, i.food_id, i.food_name, i.gram, i.calorie, i.carb, i.protein, i.fat FROM diet_log d LEFT JOIN diet_item i ON d.diet_id = i.diet_id WHERE d.diet_id = #{dietId} AND d.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE diet_log SET log_date = #{logDate}, meal_time = #{mealTime}, memo = #{memo}, total_calorie = #{totalCalorie}, total_carb = #{totalCarb}, total_protein = #{totalProtein}, total_fat = #{totalFat}, photo_path = #{photoPath} WHERE diet_id = #{dietId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diet_item ( diet_id, food_id, food_name, gram, calorie, carb, protein, fat ) VALUES ( #{dietId}, #{foodId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{foodName}, #{gram}, #{calorie}, #{carb}, #{protein}, #{fat} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM diet_log WHERE diet_id = #{dietId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.diet_id, d.user_id, DATE_FORMAT(d.log_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS log_date, d.meal_time, d.memo, d.total_calorie, d.total_carb, d.total_protein, d.total_fat, d.photo_path, i.item_id, i.food_id, i.food_name AS food_name, i.gram, i.calorie, i.carb, i.protein, i.fat FROM diet_log d LEFT JOIN diet_item i ON d.diet_id = i.diet_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.log_date = #{date} ORDER BY CASE d.meal_time WHEN '아침' THEN 1 WHEN '점심' THEN 2 WHEN '저녁' THEN 3 WHEN '간식' THEN 4 WHEN '야식' THEN 5 ELSE 99 END, i.item_id ASC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(log_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS logDate, meal_time AS mealTime FROM diet_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND log_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY log_date, meal_time

SELECT diet_id AS dietId, user_id AS userId, DATE_FORMAT(log_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS logDate, meal_time AS mealTime, memo, total_calorie AS totalCalorie, total_carb AS totalCarb, total_protein AS totalProtein, total_fat AS totalFat, photo_path AS photoPath FROM diet_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND log_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY log_date ASC, CASE meal_time WHEN '아침' THEN 1 WHEN '점심' THEN 2 WHEN '저녁' THEN 3 WHEN '간식' THEN 4 WHEN '야식' THEN 5 ELSE 99 END

SELECT f.food_id AS foodId, f.name AS name, f.calorie AS calorie, f.carb AS carb, f.protein AS protein, f.fat AS fat FROM food f WHERE f.food_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT di.food_id FROM diet_item di JOIN diet_log dl ON di.diet_id = dl.diet_id WHERE dl.user_id = #{userId} AND dl.log_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 9
